content.title: Muslims Day Friday Givers is Now Live
content.subtitle: Keep your good deeds alive, even in the midst of a busy life.
content.body:
“The most beloved deeds to Allah are those that are done consistently, even if they are small.”

(Sahih al-Bukhari, Book of Faith, Hadith 41)

Today is the most peaceful and blessed day of the week, the sacred Friday (Jumu'ah). May Allah's infinite mercy fill your life with blessings on this beautiful morning.

Many of us sincerely intend to give charity every Friday and contribute to beneficial Islamic causes. Yet, amid the endless demands of modern life, work, and responsibilities, Friday often passes before we even realize it. Despite our good intentions, we sometimes miss this beautiful act of worship simply because we forget.

To help you preserve that sincere intention, Muslims Day App proudly introduces Muslims Day Friday Givers.

How to Join

  1. Click the link : https://id.kahf.co/friday-givers/muslimsday

  2. Set your preferred amount and complete the payment

That's it! You are now a member of Muslims Day Friday Givers.

From now on, as long as your account has sufficient balance, your donation will be processed automatically every Jum'ah, In shā' Allāh.

Your consistent support will help sustain the regular Islamic and charitable initiatives carried out through the Muslims Day App, enabling us to continue serving the community more effectively.

Jazākumullāhu Khayran.

footer_button.hint: Visit to enable Auto Sadaqah every Jumu'ah. Cancel anytime.
footer_button.text: Become a Muslims Day Friday Givers!
